claim: Gemini CLI offers free tier with 60 requests/minute, 1000 requests/day, Gemini 2.5 Pro full version, 1M context window at no cost using Google login.
actionable: Adopt Gemini CLI for free CLI-based agent development; verify rate limits match your workload before scaling.

claim: Gemini CLI supports MCPs (Model Context Protocol) integration at command-line level; Hugging Face MCP server enables model and space search.
actionable: Wire up MCPs for Gemini CLI to extend agent capabilities; start with Hugging Face MCP for model discovery.

claim: Gemini CLI maintains a gemini.md context file that summarizes project state; agents reference it for consistency across long tasks.
actionable: Use gemini.md as a living project document; update it manually with important constraints and past decisions.

claim: Gemini CLI supports Google Search grounding, image uploads for sketch generation via Nano Banana, and model switching between vertices and free tier.
actionable: Combine Gemini CLI with Google Search for current information; use image uploads for visual design workflows.

claim: Gemini CLI has memory tool to save facts into context file; also supports project-level questions about codebase structure.
actionable: Regularly query Gemini CLI about your project state; save important decisions and constraints to memory.

claim: Gemini CLI is open-source; users can audit, contribute, and customize behavior before release to production.
actionable: Review Gemini CLI source before deploying in security-sensitive environments; contribute custom MCPs back to community.
